description_long: This object is a plated meal featuring a serving of white rice, two grilled sausages, and a sunny-side-up egg, all arranged on a light blue-rimmed plate. The rice mound is textured with a subtle pattern, suggesting individual grains. The sausages are reddish-brown, slightly curved, and have visible grill marks. The egg is cooked with a bright yellow yolk and a white, slightly irregular edge. The plate is round and has a soft pastel blue border, giving the meal a clean and inviting appearance. The overall presentation is simple, with each food item clearly separated and easily identifiable.
description: A plate with white rice, two grilled sausages, and a sunny-side-up egg, all neatly arranged on a blue-rimmed plate.
description_view_0: Rice mound, two sausages, and a sunny-side-up egg are all visible, with the sausages and egg in the foreground.
description_view_1: The sausages are more prominent, with the egg and rice both visible but partially overlapped by the sausages.
description_view_2: The rice is in the foreground, with the sausages and egg behind it, giving a clear view of the rice's texture.
description_view_3: The rice is closest, partially obscuring the sausages, with the egg visible to the side.
